study_set.name: UFMP and CAW Bioreactor Metagenome
study_set.description: CSTR anaerobic bioreactors fed UltraFiltered Milk Permeate (UFMP) and Cottage cheese Acid Whey (CAW) were inoculated with acid sludge microbial communities and monitored overtime for lactic acid production. Samples were taken for metagenomics analyses.
study_set.title: UFMP and CAW Bioreactor Metagenome
